title: Cult of the Lamb ResourcePack
description: A simple pack that change Netherite tools and weapons for a new look from Cult of the Lamb !
body:
This resource pack changes the look of the netherite tools and weapons, as well as the netherite upgrade smithing template for a look from the game Cult of the Lamb !

![all the textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41be8a8b429b3e8816a073e31386feedc51a5cd1.png)
